title: Slighly Better MC
body:
This Modpack is kind of like better MC but more Vanilla and with a little less mods. It has mods that overhaul creepers, Enderman,  ancient city's, animals, caves, add Voicechat, Multiplayer on single player worlds and even more! 

This Modpack is strongly based off of the Better MC Modpack.

 If you are going to play this modpack it is recommended that you dedicate atleast 4 gb of ram to your Minecraft instance.
